era: Post-Hardcore. E=7 -- angular, abrasive, dynamic, intense. Return from degree 125. Suicide Squeeze. v1.49.357.

theory_nodes.concept: Botch family tree -- Knudson to MTB (shimmer, E=6) and Cook to TAAS (violence, E=7). Same origin, opposite destinations. One of Seattle's most productive band diaspora.
examples: Russian Circles: Brian Cook's post-metal continuation.
theory_nodes.description: Botch family tree. Two branches: precision (MTB) and chaos (TAAS).

cross_references.relationship: BOTCH BRANCHES! MTB (shimmer, E=6) then TAAS (violence, E=7). Consecutive Botch descendants.
RETURN! 91-degree gap. Post-hardcore re-enters at E=7.
POST-HARDCORE PAIR! TAAS (E=7) builds toward Blood Brothers (E=8).
